ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was created */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the test case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test case (e.g., draft, ready, in progress, completed) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test case */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was last modified */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_steps" (
  "test_step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test step */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the step belongs to */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword for the test step (e.g., openBrowser, navigateUrl) */,
  "object" TEXT /* Object for the test step (e.g., None, zohourl) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for the test step (e.g., Browser, None) */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Order of the step within the test case */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result of the step */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual result of the step during execution */,
  "screenshot_path" TEXT /* Path to a screenshot taken during the step execution */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_steps_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword (e.g., openBrowser, navigateUrl) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the keyword */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the keyword (e.g., UI, API, Database) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the keyword */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the keyword was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object (e.g., None, zohourl) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the object */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the object was last modified */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the object (e.g., URL, Element, API endpoint) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the data (e.g., Browser, None) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the data */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the data was last modified */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., String, Number, Boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the environment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the environment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the environment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cycles" (
  "test_cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test cycle */,
  "test_cycle_name" TEXT /* Name of the test cycle */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment the test cycle belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the test cycle */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the test cycle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test cycle (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test cycle */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test cycle was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes for the test cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the result belongs to */,
  "test_cycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test cycle the result belongs to */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test result was created */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to execute the test case */,
  "log_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the log file generated during the test execution */,
  "screenshot_path" TEXT /* Path to a screenshot taken during the test execution */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_cycle_id") REFERENCES test_cycles ("test_cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, tester) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the permission belongs to */,
  "test_cycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test cycle the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., create, edit, execute) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the permission */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes for the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_test_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_cycle_id") REFERENCES test_cycles ("test_cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the comment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification belongs to */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the notification belongs to */,
  "test_cycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test cycle the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new comment, new test result) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the notification */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_test_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_cycle_id") REFERENCES test_cycles ("test_cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the attachment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., txt, jpg, png) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the attachment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_executions" (
  "test_execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test execution */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the execution belongs to */,
  "test_cycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test cycle the execution belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the test execution */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the test execution */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test execution (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "execution_log" TEXT /* Detailed log of the test execution */,
  "total_steps" INTEGER /* Total number of steps in the test case */,
  "passed_steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps that passed */,
  "failed_steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps that failed */,
  "skipped_steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps that were skipped */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test execution */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test execution was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_test_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_cycle_id") REFERENCES test_cycles ("test_cycle_id")
)
